query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS emulation_sessions (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  emulated_session_token VARCHAR(512) NOT NULL COMMENT 'The session token of the emulated user (current cookie value)',
  original_session_token VARCHAR(512) NOT NULL COMMENT 'The original admin session token to restore on exit',
  emulator_user_id INT NOT NULL COMMENT 'The user who started the emulation',
  emulated_user_id INT NOT NULL COMMENT 'The user being emulated',
  created_at BIGINT NOT NULL COMMENT 'Unix ms timestamp',
  INDEX idx_emulated_token (emulated_session_token(255))
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS emulation_sessions (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  emulated_session_token VARCHAR(512) NOT NULL COMMENT 'The session token of the emulated user (current cookie value)',
  original_session_token VARCHAR(512) NOT NULL COMMENT 'The original admin session token to restore on exit',
  emulator_user_id INT NOT NULL COMMENT 'The user who started the emulation',
  emulated_user_id INT NOT NULL COMMENT 'The user being emulated',
  created_at BIGINT NOT NULL COMMENT 'Unix ms timestamp',
  INDEX idx_emulated_token (emulated_session_token(255))
);
